Variables.Name: SourceName
Variables.Description: The strength of the tangent from the source point for each beam.

Variables.Name: bSourceAbsolute
Variables.Description: Whether to treat the as an absolute position in world space.

Variables.Name: bLockSource
Variables.Description: Whether to lock the source to the life of the particle.

Variables.Name: SourceTangentMethod
Variables.Description: The method to use for the source tangent.

Variables.Name: SourceTangent
Variables.Description: The tangent for the source point for each beam.

Variables.Name: bLockSourceTangent
Variables.Description: Whether to lock the source to the life of the particle.

Variables.Name: SourceStrength
Variables.Description: The strength of the tangent from the source point for each beam.

Variables.Name: bLockSourceStength
Variables.Description: Whether to lock the source to the life of the particle.
